message:
feat(markers): add marker/decoration API with absolute line tracking

Introduce MarkerStore and HistoryWindow for anchoring markers to
absolute scrollback line indices. Key changes:

- Scrollback: track oldest_line_absolute, add absolute indexing helpers
  (oldest/newest/next_line_absolute, absolute_line_for_index)
- New markers.rs module with MarkerStore, DecorationKind, diagnostics
- FrankenTermWeb WASM bindings: createMarker, dropMarker, markersState,
  createDecoration, dropDecoration, decorationsState, and
  drainMarkerDecorationJsonl for replay-grade troubleshooting
- Reconcile markers on viewport navigation, resize, and engine sync
- Format fixes in attach.rs and golden_frame_e2e.rs tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
